User.title: User Profile
User.description: Information about a registered user (learner, developer, or admin).

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user profile was created.

Inquiry.title: Enterprise Inquiry
Inquiry.description: A request from a company looking to hire talent.

name.description: The name of the contact person.

email.description: The email address of the contact person.

needs.description: A description of the company's talent needs.

budget.description: The estimated budget for the project.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the inquiry was submitted.

Application.title: Developer Application
Application.description: An application from a developer looking to join the network.

email.description: The email address of the developer.

portfolio.description: The URL of the developer's portfolio or GitHub.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the application was submitted.

Course.title: Training Course
Course.description: A training course offered by Coders 4 Afrika.

level.description: The difficulty level of the course.

icon.description: The icon name for the course.

color.description: The brand color associated with the course.

Developer.title: Marketplace Developer
Developer.description: A developer profile visible in the talent marketplace.

role.description: The developer's role (e.g., Senior Full Stack).

image.description: The URL of the developer's profile picture.

developers/{developerId}.description: Collection of developers in the marketplace.
